_translation_notes: Page contact. CSS du form préservé. spécifique upgradé en Fraunces.

strings.fr:
<style>
.elementor-element-pn6ueti3 { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 38% 58% !important; gap: 4% !important; flex-wrap: nowrap !important; align-items: start; }
.elementor-element-pn6ueti3 > .e-con { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; flex: 0 0 auto !important; }
@media (max-width: 1024px) { .elementor-element-pn6ueti3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }
/* Form layout: 2 colonnes pour les champs 50% */
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-form-fields-wrapper { display: grid !important; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px 16px; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-group { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-group-courriel,
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-group-raison,
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-group-message,
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-group-field_406df1f,
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-type-submit { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
@media (max-width: 600px) { .elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-form-fields-wrapper { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
/* Form styling */
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field { padding: 10px 12px !important; min-height: 40px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(28,29,31,0.04); font-family: Inter, sans-serif !important; font-size: 14px !important; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 textarea.elementor-field { min-height: 90px; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-field-label { font-family: Inter, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600 !important; font-size: 12px !important; letter-spacing: 0.02em !important; color: #1C1D1F !important; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-button { background-color: #1C1D1F !important; color: #F4EFE6 !important; font-family: Inter, sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600 !important; letter-spacing: 0.02em !important; border-radius: 12px !important; padding: 14px 28px !important; transition: all 0.2s ease; }
.elementor-element-gnmvbbh8 .elementor-button:hover { background-color: #C9A35C !important; color: #1C1D1F !important; }
/* Compact spacing pour minimiser scroll */
.elementor-element-3z67jb6s { gap: 14px !important; }
.elementor-element-3z67jb6s h1 { font-size: 36px !important; line-height: 1.1 !important; margin: 0 !important; }
.elementor-element-3z67jb6s p { font-size: 15px !important; line-height: 1.55 !important; }
</style>

strings.fr: Notre équipe d'experts SolidWorks et 3DEXPERIENCE est à votre écoute pour comprendre votre contexte et vous proposer la bonne approche. Remplissez le formulaire ci-dessous, nous vous recontactons sous 24h ouvrées.
strings.en: Our team of SolidWorks and 3DEXPERIENCE experts is here to understand your context and propose the right approach. Fill out the form below, we'll get back to you within 24 business hours.

strings.fr: 1804 chemin Gomin, Quebec, QC G1S1P2 Canada
strings.en: 1804 Chemin Gomin, Quebec City, QC G1S 1P2 Canada
